home.title: Home
home.update_odo_desc: Update the current odometer reading. This is also reflected in maintenance alerts.
home.update_odo_invalid: Please enter a valid odometer reading

garage.title: Garage
garage.subtitle: Manage your cars and wishlist items
garage.include_price_in_cost: Include purchase price in total cost
garage.include_price_in_cost_hint: When on, the purchase price is added to the total cost
garage.delete_car_warning: This action cannot be undone. All linked cost records, wishlist items, and recurring costs will be permanently deleted.
garage.delete_car_archive_hint: To keep the history, change the status to "Former Car" instead of deleting.
garage.delete_confirm_instruction: Type the car name exactly to confirm
garage.register_car_first_line2: register a car in "My Cars" first.
garage.confirm_delete_item: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.
garage.adjust_image_hint: Drag the image to reposition it

records.title: Records
records.subtitle: Log your mileage and expenses
records.no_records_line2: Tap the button above to add your first record!
records.confirm_delete: Delete this record? This cannot be undone.
records.recurring_form_hint: A record will be created automatically on the billing date
records.no_recurring_desc: Automatically track parking, loans, insurance, and other regular expenses
records.recurring_banner_body: When you open the app, any recurring costs past their billing date are automatically added to your Manual Records. The next billing date is then updated automatically.

stats.title: Stats
stats.subtitle: Analyze your spending and mileage
stats.period_edit_hint: Tap a date to change the period

mypage.title: My Page
mypage.subtitle: Configure your profile and app settings
mypage.profile_desc: Set your display name and user ID. This info is shown on the dashboard and to other users.
mypage.maintenance_desc: Set distance and time thresholds for maintenance alerts on the home screen. Use the toggle to turn alerts on or off per item.
mypage.home_order_desc: Rearrange cards on the home screen. Layout is optimized for both PC and mobile.
mypage.home_order_hint: Drag the handle on the right to reorder. Cards higher in the list appear first on the home screen.
mypage.language_desc: Change the display language. Changes take effect immediately.
mypage.accessibility_desc: Adjust visual preferences such as chart color mode. Changes take effect immediately.
mypage.chart_color_mode_tooltip: Basic uses a simple palette with fewer colors; Colorful spreads out hues to make categories easier to tell apart.
mypage.chart_color_basic_note: A simple palette with fewer colors
mypage.chart_color_colorful_note: Distinct hues to make categories easier to tell apart
mypage.export_desc: Export all of your records (all cars, all periods) as a CSV file. You can open it in Excel or Google Sheets.

login.subtitle: Start managing your car
login.confirmation_sent: Confirmation email sent! Click the link in the email to complete registration.

signup.subtitle: Create a new account
signup.user_id_hint: Only letters, numbers, and underscores (_) are allowed
signup.email_taken: This email address is already in use.
signup.user_id_taken: This User ID is already taken. Please choose a different one.
signup.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signup.invalid_user_id: User ID can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores (_).

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service (the "Terms") set out the conditions for using "Milenote" (the "Service"), a vehicle maintenance cost and expense management application provided by {{operator}} (the "Operator"). The Service is developed and provided primarily for personal use. Please read these Terms carefully before using the Service.

applicability.heading: Applicability
applicability.body: These Terms are intended to define the conditions for providing the Service and the rights and obligations between the Operator and users regarding the use of the Service, and apply to all relationships related to the use of the Service between users and the Operator.

registration.heading: Registration
registration.body: Users may use the Service by creating an account by registering an email address and other information using the method prescribed by the Operator. Users are responsible for keeping their registration information accurate and up to date, and bear full responsibility for managing their account and password.

prohibited.heading: Prohibited Conduct
prohibited.body: When using the Service, users must not engage in any act that violates laws or public order and morals, infringes the rights of the Operator, other users, or third parties, interferes with the functioning of the Service's servers or network, disrupts the operation of the Service, or is otherwise deemed inappropriate by the Operator.

data.heading: Handling of Data and Backups
data.body: The Service stores data entered by users, such as vehicle information and expense or maintenance cost records, in a database. The Service is intended for personal use, and the Operator does not provide users' data to third parties or use it beyond the scope necessary to provide the Service. To guard against the risk of data loss due to unexpected defects or failures, users are encouraged to regularly back up important data themselves.

suspension.heading: Suspension and Changes to the Service
suspension.body: The Operator may change the content of the Service or suspend, interrupt, or terminate all or part of the Service without prior notice to users if it determines that there is system maintenance, a failure, a specification change in an external service used by the Service (such as Next.js, Supabase, or Vercel), or other unavoidable circumstances. The Operator bears no obligation to provide permanent maintenance or updates for the Service.

ip.heading: Intellectual Property and License
ip.body: The source code of the Service is published under the MIT License. The various open-source libraries used in the Service are subject to their respective license terms. Rights to the data entered by users into the Service belong to the users.

disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: The Service is provided "As-Is," and the Operator does not expressly or impliedly guarantee that the Service is free from defects in fact or law. The Operator shall not be liable for any damages incurred by users arising from the use of or inability to use the Service, loss of data, or otherwise in connection with the Service.

changes.heading: Changes to the Terms
changes.body: The Operator may change these Terms at any time without notifying users when it deems necessary. The revised Terms shall take effect from the time they are posted within the Service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy (the "Policy") describes how "Milenote" (the "Service"), a vehicle maintenance cost and expense management application provided by {{operator}} (the "Operator"), handles users' information.

collection.heading: Information We Collect
collection.body: The Service collects the email address and User ID entered during account registration, as well as vehicle information, expense and maintenance cost records, recurring expense information, and similar data recorded by users through the use of the Service.

usage.heading: Purpose of Use
usage.body: We use the collected information to provide and operate the Service, to store, display, and aggregate users' data, and to maintain and improve the Service. The Operator does not use the information beyond the scope necessary to achieve these purposes.

external.heading: Use of External Services
external.body: The Service uses Supabase as its database and authentication platform, and Vercel as its hosting environment. Users' information is stored and processed on these services. The handling of information on each service is subject to the privacy policy established by its respective provider.

images.heading: Handling of Vehicle Images
images.body: Vehicle images uploaded by users are stored in public storage. As a result, any third party who knows an image's URL may be able to view that image even without logging in. Metadata such as location information (GPS) within the image is automatically removed at upload, but the subjects captured in the image (such as license plates or surrounding scenery) remain as part of the image itself. Please refrain from uploading images containing information you do not want disclosed to third parties.

thirdparty.heading: Provision to Third Parties
thirdparty.body: Except as required by law, the Operator does not provide users' personal information to third parties without obtaining the user's prior consent. The Service is intended for personal use, and the Operator does not intentionally provide or disclose the collected information externally.

management.heading: Information Management
management.body: The Operator takes appropriate security measures to prevent the leakage, loss, or damage of users' information. However, the Service is the product of individual development, and the Operator does not guarantee the complete preservation of data. Users are encouraged to back up important data themselves.

disclosure.heading: Disclosure, Correction, and Deletion
disclosure.body: Users may view, correct, and delete their own data through operations within the Service. For requests such as deleting an account or stored data, please contact us through the GitHub repository where the Service's source code is published.

changes.heading: Changes to the Privacy Policy
changes.body: The Operator may revise this Policy as necessary. The revised Policy shall take effect from the time it is posted within the Service.
